de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class FindTacletAppContainer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.RuleAppContainer
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.TacletAppContainer
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.FindTacletAppContainer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Comparable<RuleAppContainer>

    public class FindTacletAppContainer
extends TacletAppContainer
    Instances of this class are immutable

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private PosInOccurrence applicationPosition 
      private FormulaTag positionTag
      The position of the rule app in two different representations: positionTag denotes the concerned formula and survives modifications of the sequent and of parts of the formula, and applicationPosition is the original position for which the rule app was created

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      FindTacletAppContainer(NoPosTacletApp p_app, PosInOccurrence p_pio, RuleAppCost p_cost, Goal p_goal, long p_age)

      checks if the modification path and the position where this taclet application has been matched again denote independent subformulas.

      private boolean updateContextIsRecorded()

    • Field Detail

      • positionTag

        private final FormulaTag positionTag
        The position of the rule app in two different representations: positionTag denotes the concerned formula and survives modifications of the sequent and of parts of the formula, and applicationPosition is the original position for which the rule app was created

      • applicationPosition

        private final PosInOccurrence applicationPosition

    • Constructor Detail

      • FindTacletAppContainer

        FindTacletAppContainer(NoPosTacletApp p_app,
                       PosInOccurrence p_pio,
                       RuleAppCost p_cost,
                       Goal p_goal,
                       long p_age)

    • Method Detail

      • isStillApplicable

        protected boolean isStillApplicable(Goal p_goal)
        Specified by:
        isStillApplicable in class TacletAppContainer
        Returns:
        true iff the stored rule app is applicable for the given sequent, i.e. if the find-position does still exist (if-formulas are not considered)

      • subformulaOrPreceedingUpdateHasChanged

        private boolean subformulaOrPreceedingUpdateHasChanged(Goal p_goal)
        Returns:
        true iff a subformula that contains the find position stored by this object has been altered since the creation of this object or if a preceding update has changed

      • independentSubformulas

        private boolean independentSubformulas(PosInOccurrence changePos,
                                       SequentFormula newFormula)
        checks if the modification path and the position where this taclet application has been matched again denote independent subformulas. The modification affects a formula F if F is a subformula of the modified one or the modification took part inside an update which may occur in the update prefix instantiation of the taclet application
        Returns:
        true iff applicationPosition is in the scope of the position p_pos (the formulas are not compared, only the positions within the formulas) and no indirect relationship exists which is established by a modification that occurred inside an update

      • updateContextIsRecorded

        private boolean updateContextIsRecorded()
        Returns:
        true iff the update context (updates above the application position) is relevant and stored for this taclet app. In this case, the taclet app has to be discarded as soon as the update context changes

      • getPosInOccurrence

        protected PosInOccurrence getPosInOccurrence(Goal p_goal)
        Overrides:
        getPosInOccurrence in class TacletAppContainer
        Returns:
        non-null for FindTaclets
